name: TAFE NSW Course Search Load Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  # push:               # Uncomment if you want auto-run on push
  #   branches: [main]

jobs:
  load-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup k6 with browser
        uses: grafana/setup-k6-action@v1
        with:
          browser: true

      - name: Run load test for TAFE NSW Course Search
        run: k6 run tests/course-search-load-test.js
        env:
          K6_BROWSER_ENABLED: "true"

      - name: Upload HTML report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: always()
        with:
          name: TAFE-NSW-course-search-load-test-report
          path: report.html
          retention-days: 30
